hero.subtitle: Tafahom helps you understand, express, and connect with people—anytime, anywhere.

home.world_subtitle: Experience the first real-time, bidirectional AI translator for Egyptian Sign Language. Empowering millions to communicate independently, accurately, and naturally.
home.silent_struggle_desc: Deaf and hard-of-hearing individuals in Egypt struggle to communicate effectively in hospitals, schools, workplaces, government offices, and public services.
home.problem1_desc: Forced to rely on lip-reading or complex writing in daily interactions.
home.problem2_desc: A severe shortage of tools tailored to the Egyptian Sign Language dialect.
home.problem3_desc: Constant need for human interpreters compromises personal independence.
home.problem4_desc: Communication barriers lead to marginalization in schools and workplaces.
home.ecosystem_desc: We built a powerful pipeline that moves seamlessly from visual capture to spoken word, and vice versa.
home.solution1_desc: The largest open-source dataset for Egyptian Sign Language with over 10,000 highly accurate samples.
home.solution2_desc: State-of-the-art Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Networks precisely track hand and body skeleton points.
home.solution3_desc: Context-aware gloss-to-text translation ensuring grammatically correct spoken Arabic output.
home.solution4_desc: Natural-sounding Egyptian voice generation converting translated text into human-like audio.
home.solution5_desc: Seamless deployment across web, mobile, and desktop. Always accessible when you need it most.

account.two_factor_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
account.delete_warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

appearance.theme_desc: Select how Tafahom looks for you.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: We believe accessibility should be free. Advanced tools are available for professionals who need more processing power.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For professionals and daily active users.

dataset.title: Contribute to EASL-10K
dataset.subtitle: Help us build the largest open-source dataset for Egyptian Sign Language. Your contribution directly improves the AI's accuracy.
dataset.upload_desc: Ensure you are in a well-lit area and your hands are clearly visible in the frame.
dataset.drop_click: Drag & drop or Click to browse
dataset.label_desc: What word or phrase did you just sign in Egyptian Sign Language?
dataset.submit_desc: Thank you for your contribution. Once verified, it will be added to the EASL dataset.

generator.placeholder: Enter text to translate into sign language...

assistant.title: TAFAHOM Assistant
assistant.welcome: Hi there! I'm your TAFAHOM assistant. How can I help you?
assistant.bot_response: I'm a beta demo bot right now, but soon I'll be able to help you deeply with TAFAHOM integrations!
